viral_posts.hook: You want to read this caption
viral_posts.caption:
You want to read this caption 

It was Saturday, July 15 a week or so after Fourth of July and I poured out the last little bit of alcohol. I had in my house and decided never again.

I had a large task in front of me. I had to build a six figure company in about 30 days to be able to afford to live out here and fight for my daughter’s custody.

I had everything stripped from me. I had shut down all my other business ventures to go all in on this business with my ex-wife.

And so when she put me on the street, I essentially had to whip up a six figure business in 30 days. There was no other option she had burned the boats. It wasn’t even my choice.

And faced with that, I had two choices I could lean into vices and slow slowly wait to die

Or I could become a man let go of boyish things remove the devices from my life and become everything she told me I never could be

And I did I built the business to six figures and then seven I want custody of my daughter and I can proudly say I’m the best dad I’ve ever met

I dealt with hardships, slander and living across the country with no family or friends to help me navigate life as a simple father and a business founder at the same time

I don’t know how I did it, but I can tell you two things. It wouldn’t have happened with alcohol and it wouldn’t have happened without Jesus Christ.

Here’s to 1000 days sober

Ave Ave Christus Rex

#soberliving #sobriety #fitnesslife #businessowner #1000days

viral_posts.hook: How long till it’s all in house?
viral_posts.caption:
How long till it’s all in house?

There are a couple of coaches that I mentor who have already made their entire app themselves using Claude

And watching trainer eyes go down today for the entire day when most coaches are trying to do their check-in it made me think

How long until the majority of coaches figure out you can build an app with more customizations more tailored to your specific style of COACHING and have it functional all by just learning how to use Claude

It’s definitely a ways away, and I don’t think many people are good enough yet to know how to do it

But there are multiple coaches in my program right now who do you have their own apps and they are having a field day today watching everybody else scramble

You have to realize that AI is not for your carousels and it shouldn’t even be scripting your content

AI is for building infrastructure for your business that allows you to own all the pieces of it

And to build more inside of those business pieces to make your job easier less manual more effective

And if that interests you, you should definitely follow me here because I post all kinds of different builds for Fitness coaches

🚨PSA to all fitness coaches 🚨

I run a coaching program I’ve taken multiple coaches to $100,000 per month Let’s make one thing crystal clear.

The coaches hitting these numbers have been in business for years

That number does not come solely from ads

It takes 6 to 12 months for those ads to double the top line revenue of the business

If those ads are going to consistently pull in that same amount of revenue month of a month

every single coach who’s doing $100,000 to $200,000 a month in our program also has amazing organic content and they post extremely consistently

Being told to do one or the other like it is a magic fix is a lie and you should know better

Cutting out carbs was never the answer so neither is cutting out organic or cutting out ads

You need a well-rounded business strategy that you stick to for 6 to 12 months

A realistic goal over there 6 to 12 months should be to double what’s your business is pulling

If you’re lucky, you may be an outlier and 3 to 4X with your Business is pulling in

do not be the clients you hate stop trying to purchase the quick fixes

If you want to see what an actual strategy looks like deployed over 6 to 12 months at minimum to 2 to 3X your business is current run rate

Then hop on a call with our team we will walk you through what this actually looks like because I am sick of seeing people give you these false promises

Heck, we won’t even ask you to buy anything. We’ll just show you exactly what the process should look like so that the next time you do decide to buy something you are armed with the knowledge of what the actual systems and timelines look like from coaches who have actually done this and stuck with it before.

And for all that is holy, please don’t go paying this man in tens of thousands of dollars to have a “$1 million client getting system install installed in the next seven days”

Like go say that to yourself in the mirror and see how stupid it sounds

viral_posts.hook: Create content for specific sides of the brain…
viral_posts.caption:
Create content for specific sides of the brain…

Here’s how

when you create content that focuses on the features and the benefits and the tangible tactical things that the client is getting

You’re selling to the right sided brain the analytical part of the brain that makes very well thought out decision decisions

This was solely attract people who are right brain thinkers, who are very analytical who will fight you on price take hours if not days to make decisions and will ultimately Syed with the cheapest option because that is what is most important to them

It’s why all of this work you’re doing to make your offer seem like it has all these bells and whistles ends up, bringing in the brokest leads

Conversely, if you sell to the left side of the human brain by using desired outcomes and story selling wrapped up in emotional analogies, you will begin to whip your viewers into a frenzy of desire and want

And this is powerful because this can be used for good, and this can definitely be used to scam and grift 

So to do this effectively and have a clear idea of what the true desired outcome is for the product that you’re selling

Then you want to lead with that desired outcome, while telling a story that illustrates the path to that desired outcome using your method

Do you want to over exaggerate how easy this was how superior it was to other options and the fact that this method is new indifferent compared to other things out there

Make it relatable by showing as many people as possible who will also gone through this method and achieve this result and also believe that it is superior irresistible new and different?

In doing so you will be selling hope to people who will pay money for more hope

Again, this can be used for good or evil so be careful with this information

viral_posts.hook: The minute you change this success flows effortlessly
viral_posts.caption:
The minute you change this success flows effortlessly 

now the secret sauce to this is your actual belief in your offer. You truly have to believe you have something that is great and is worth that level of hype.

@therealbrianmark build his business over a decade and has thousands of case studies of success, which is why he’s able to have such conviction

But you don’t need to have such a high level of reputable success. All you need is one story, even your own that you truly believe in that you sell honestly that won’t give you the same level of conviction.

So stop trying to be everyone else stealing their content, rewriting their scripts searching for their hooks

Just start passionately sharing what makes you different. What makes you special what you love about your offer

And if you don’t know any of that yet, well great we have a $5000 course that we just made free

All you have to do to get access to it is comment “offer” and I’ll send you your logins

What’s your opinion on this? 

and to be clear if you’re doing fantastic, and you smoke weed a lot cool just imagine how much better you could be doing and feeling if you didn’t

I love that you at 50% are still a superstar but I wanna see what you at 100% looks like and I know you do too

viral_posts.hook: Maybe this means something to you let me know
viral_posts.caption: Maybe this means something to you let me know

You can do this too

I don’t care how sad your story is how stacked the odds are against you right now you have everything you need in your arsenal to win

All your lacking is the circumstances to push you to do it

And I truly believe if you are great, those circumstances will come either by your choice or the universe will simply deliver them to you

So you can go out there you can put yourself in uncomfortable situations. You can stretch yourself further than you think you can go on your terms.

Or you can wait for the universe to bend you and force you to actualize the potential you know you have inside

As someone who waited in weakness and apathy were far too long and had to learn the hard way, take it from me

Choose the hard road now win the battles. Now you have everything you need you were meant to do this. Take the fucking leap.

Two key takeaways from this…

But first an apology I am a very objective thinker and so presented with facts I drop opinions and I lean into what’s actually real

And I can’t deny he gets real results for real coaches and they’re very happy (for the most part)

My first observation would be that this program is clearly designed for coaches who are already various established. You need to have the teams the SOP‘s and the systems in place for ads to be able to run and you need to have clear amounts of profit to be able to throw into ads on top of the investment you’re making for this program to work well for you.

Second, there is a difference between the results that someone gets and the way that person presents themselves online. I’m a big fan of the results that Will is getting his clients. I’m not a huge fan of how he voices that online and his attitude towards other coaches in the industry.

I wanna see this industry grow over the next 10 years and I wanna see it grow into a place that we’re all proud to be a part of 

So I still stand by what I said when it comes to how he is dealing with other coaches in the industry in their containers

I do not agree with attempting to poach clients from other coaches. I do not agree with talking poorly about other coaches and that’s why I’m making this video.

I don’t like that I took a shot at him, especially without having all the information. And clearly I am at a 10th of Will’s size and so I’m just punching up Will not punching down still isn’t a great look and I don’t think it’s the most productive use of any of our times

So while I stand by what I said when it came to how Will is dealing with other coaches

I do respect the results he gets for his clients and how he chooses to talk about those is completely up to him

With all that being said, let’s keep the focus on what we are all trying to do here which is impact more lives through Fitness

but thank you to all the clients from Will’s program who commented on the video and help me get a better understanding of what’s going on inside the container

Building 7-figure businesses like legos

there’s a proven process it’s working right now and it’s all built out of AI

And while you’re following your favorite guru, who’s teaching you topics that helped him get his Lamborghini five years ago we’re out here helping people sign clients in real time

We’re not installing $1 million Funnel in your business in the next seven days

We’re not having a post six times a day dancing around your little screen

We’re implementing systems backed by a guy that are actually driving the needle forward

So you can keep opting into all those online gurus promising you the stars and delivering you nothing

Or you can actually start listening to the pros who are making seven figures the norm in 2026

-Will
